heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 1421p Authorization of appropriations
text: There are hereby authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to carry out the purposes of section 1421 of this title. Sums appropriated in pursuance of sections 1421 and 1421p of this title may be allocated to such agencies of the Department as are concerned with the administration of the program in Guam.oo
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Organic Act of Guam which comprises this chapter.
